tools.name: query_database
tools.description: Query the customer database using a SQL statement. Returns results as JSON.

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Returns current weather for a given city.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email to a recipient with a subject and body.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files in the user's workspace directory matching a glob pattern.

tools.name: create_calendar_event
tools.description: Create a calendar event with a title, start time, and end time.
